data.name: College Roommates 👩‍🎓
data.detailed_description:
Darla and Becky are two sexy college coeds who carry big secrets – big secret dicks! They want a new roommate but she’s going to have to be just right. Will sweet Jenny be the right fit for these two, or is her virginal, home-grown nature and complete lack of experience going to get her kicked out the door?

Key Features

• Visual Novel about sexual adventures of college girls

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Girl fucked by Futanari Couple

• Full HD (1920x1080 pixels) resolution graphics

• Girl's and Futas' hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

data.short_description: Darla and Becky are hoping for a new roommate. They want someone with brains who can help them pass their classes. But both of these sexy college coeds have the same secret, and only the right roomie can pass their very rigorous test to see if she’s freaky enough to stay!

英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
